m5_severity_match.note: Matched rows with non-empty GT rationale_if_no vs confidence tiers.

m6_gsop_coverage.note: Mean Jaccard on matched rows; GT side empty if CSV has no gsop_codes.

missed_subcats: Phase 3 only-Subject not meet inclusion criteria 2 [Pts to comply with SoA visits, assessments/procedures. a. Mandatory blood and tumor at diagnosis of local adv met aBC. If not, de novo biopsy needed. Tumor at initial diagnosis accepted if bone mets only
Subject did not meet inclusion criteria 1 [Participants aged 18 years or older (or the minimum age of consent in accordance with local regulations) at screening.]
Subject did not meet inclusion criteria 4 [No prior systemic anti-cancer therapy for their locoregionally advanced or metastatic disease.]
Subject did not meet inclusion criteria 5 [At least 1 measurable lesion as defined by RECIST v1.1. Bone only disease: participants with only non-measurable lesions are eligible.]
Subject didnot meet inclusion criteria 3 [Local advanced/metastatic BC not amenable to surgery or radiotherapy with curative intent. BC to be ER(+)≥1%,HER2(-)]

Subject met exclusion criteria 1 [Other medical, psychiatric cond. include recent suicidal idea, behavior, abnormal lab that may increase risk of study participation or investigator’s judgment, make participant inappropriate for study.]
Subject met exclusion criteria 10 [Hematologic abnormalities as defined in protocol.]
Subject met exclusion criteria 11 [Renal impairment as defined in protocol.]
Subject met exclusion criteria 12 [Hepatic dysfunction as defined in protocol.]
Subject met exclusion criteria 13 [Known active infection including SARS-CoV-2, HBV, HCV, and HIV or AIDS- related illness, as defined in protocol.]

Subject met exclusion criteria 14 [Refractory nausea & vomiting, chronic GI disease, GI ulcer, GI bleeding, inability to swallow study drugs, prior significant gastric, bowel resection preventing adequate absorption of study drugs.]

Subject met exclusion criteria 15 [Site staff directly involved in conduct of study and family members, site otherwise supervised by investigator, sponsor and delegate employees directly involved in conduct of study and family members.]
Subject met exclusion criteria 2 [History of any other tumor malignancies within the past 3 years as per protocol. Participants with inflammatory BC and HSCT are excluded.]
Subject met exclusion criteria 3 [Participants with newly diagnosed/symptomatic CNS mets, carcinomatous meningitis,or leptomeningeal disease. Exception are detailed in the study protocol.]

Subject met exclusion criteria 4 [Pts in visceral crisis at risk of immediate life-threatening complications including pts with massive uncontrolled pleural/pericardial/peritoneal effusion, pulmonary lymphangitis, liver involvement above 50%.]
Subject met exclusion criteria 5 [Impaired cardiovascular function or clinically significant cardiovascular diseases as defined in protocol.]

Subject met exclusion criteria 6 [Relapse while on or within 12 months ofcompleting standard adjuvant ET. CDK4/6i, ARV-471, fulvestrant, and other investigational agents (including novel ET, any SERDs, SERCAs, CERANs) in any setting.]
Subject met exclusion criteria 7 [Major Surgery, RT or systemic therapy for BC ≤ 14 days pre- randomization. Pts with prior RT ≥25% of BM are not eligible.]
Subject met exclusion criteria 9 [Concurrent administration of drugs, food and herbal supplement that are strong CYP3A inhibitors or inducers.]
hallucinated_subcats: Participant met all eligibility criteria but source documentation is incomplete or missing
Participant met all eligibility criteria but was randomized prior to assessment of all eligibility criteria

missed_subcats: Blind compromised
DOSING error: underdose
Dosing error: overdose.
hallucinated_subcats: Dosing/Administration error for vepdegestrant, palbociclib, letrozole, or LHRH agonist
Required LHRH agonist not administered to pre-/peri-menopausal female or male participant
Storage error/temperature excursion. IP administered to participant without Sponsor approval
Study drug not held despite AE that required dose to be held per protocol
Study drug not reduced as per protocol for toxicity (e.g., palbociclib or vepdegestrant)
Subject received wrong treatment (e.g., randomized to Arm A but received letrozole, or Arm B but received vepdegestrant)
Mandatory concomitant medication (LHRH agonist for pre-/peri-menopausal female and male participants) not taken/administered or not used as specified per protocol
Participant received prohibited concurrent systemic anti-cancer therapy or radiotherapy during the study drug treatment period
Participant took prohibited concomitant medication (e.g., strong CYP3A inhibitors or inducers) during the study treatment period
Abnormal lab result (e.g., Grade 4 neutropenia, hepatic dysfunction) not followed up appropriately
Blood samples for vepdegestrant PK, palbociclib PK, or pharmacodynamics not done
Blood samples for vepdegestrant PK, palbociclib PK, or pharmacodynamics not properly collected, stored or handled
Clinical laboratory results were not reviewed by an Investigator in a timely manner
Critical safety labs required for dosing decisions (e.g., ANC, PLT, ALT, AST, Bilirubin) not done
Study participant dosed without required pregnancy test done for WOCBP
Tumor tissue for biomarkers or ctDNA blood samples not collected per protocol
Active Treatment Phase visit (e.g., Cycle 1 Day 15, Cycle 2 Day 1) conducted outside the protocol-specified window
Safety Follow-up, Long Term Follow-up, or Survival Follow-up visit conducted outside the protocol-specified window
Screening visit completed outside the protocol-specified window of ≤ 28 days prior to randomization
Visit not done
Visit not performed per protocol
12-Lead ECG not performed per protocol, impacting safety monitoring for QTcF prolongation.
Disease assessment (tumor imaging or bone scan) not performed, incomplete, or performed out of window, impacting the primary endpoint of PFS by BICR.
Patient-Reported Outcomes (EQ-5D-5L, EORTC QLQ-C30, EORTC QLQ-BR23) not completed per protocol.
Pharmacokinetic (PK) blood samples for vepdegestrant or palbociclib not collected or collected incorrectly.
Procedures for contraception counseling or contraception requirements not followed for IOCBP or male participants.
Required tumor tissue or blood sample for biomarkers (e.g., ctDNA) not collected at diagnosis or de novo biopsy not performed for Phase 3 participants.
Participant didn't receive the drugs they were randomized to (e.g., assigned to Vepdegestrant + Palbociclib but received Letrozole + Palbociclib)
Participant randomized in IRT in error despite not meeting eligibility criteria or being a screen failure
Participant randomized out of protocol defined window (e.g., >28 days after start of screening)
Participant randomized prior to completion of all required screening assessments (e.g., tumor biopsy or baseline scans)
Adverse event (including protocol-specified events of interest such as Grade 4 neutropenia) was not recorded in the clinical database
Clinically significant laboratory or ECG abnormality was not reported as an adverse event
SAE Not reported by investigator to Ethics Committee / IRB per local regulations
SAE/EIU not reported to Sponsor
SAE/EIU not reported to Sponsor within specified timeframe
Participant became pregnant during the study but study treatment was not discontinued
Participant met protocol-specified criteria for study treatment discontinuation (e.g., objective disease progression per RECIST v1.1, unacceptable toxicity) but study treatment was not discontinued
Participant started a new anti-cancer therapy but study treatment was not discontinued
Participant withdrew consent but continued to receive study treatment or undergo study procedures
ICD signed by subject/LAR had not received IRB/IEC approval
ICD was lost, no copy available
Participant confidentiality compromised
Participant randomized to Phase 3 despite Sponsor decision not to conduct the Phase 3 portion of the study
Subject/LAR did not sign ICD & did not give verbal consent
Subject/LAR signed and dated ICD after screen/enroll date

missed_subcats: ICD not signed by impartial witness, when applicable
ICD signed by unauthorized site personnel
ICD was lost, copy available
Subject/LAR did not sign the ICD but gave verbal consent
Subject/LAR signed and dated ICD after screen/enroll date
hallucinated_subcats: Participant signed a superseded or outdated version of the Informed Consent Document (ICD).

near_misses.generated_text: Participant did not meet one or more inclusion criteria but was randomized to the study treatment

near_misses.gt_text: Subject met exclusion criteria 8 [Any unresolved toxicities from prior surgeries or therapies or other toxicities as per protocol.]

near_misses.generated_text: Participant took permitted concomitant medication, but not as specified per protocol
Participant randomized under wrong stratification factors
Participant was discontinued from study treatment or the study but did not meet any protocol-specified discontinuation criteria
near_misses.gt_text: Participant developed withdrawal criteria during the study but was not withdrawn

near_misses.generated_text: Participant did not sign the additional consent for optional procedures (e.g., Retained Research Blood Sample for Genetics) but these biologic samples were collected.
near_misses.gt_text: Subject did not sign the additional consent for optional procedure(s) but biologic samples were collected

near_misses.generated_text: The Informed Consent Document (ICD) signed by the participant had not received IRB/IEC approval.

near_misses.generated_text: Participant signed the Informed Consent Document (ICD) after study-specified screening procedures (e.g., tumor biopsy, blood samples, ECG) had been performed.
near_misses.gt_text: Subject signed ICD after study-specified procedures had been performed

near_misses.generated_text: The Informed Consent Document (ICD) was not translated into the participant's native language.
near_misses.gt_text: ICD not translated to subject's/LAR native language

near_misses.gt_text: ICD was lost, no copy available
